ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "entrez_gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene according to Entrez database */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entrez_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isoforms" (
  "isoform_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each isoform */,
  "entrez_gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene to which the isoform belongs */,
  "genbank_accession" TEXT /* GenBank accession number associated with the isoform */,
  "isoform_category" TEXT /* Category of the isoform (e.g., reference, alternative) */,
  "isoform_novelty" TEXT /* Novelty status of the isoform (e.g., known, novel) */,
  "isoform_length" INTEGER /* Length of the isoform sequence */,
  "isoform_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the isoform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isoform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isoforms_entrez_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrez_gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("entrez_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entrez_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the gene data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entrez_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrez_gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("entrez_gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_genes" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "entrez_gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the project */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., target, reference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "entrez_gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., investigator, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-author, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "data_sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the data */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the data */,
  "data_sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of data sharing (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
